path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 407px; margin-left: 562px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 280px; height: 1px; padding-top: 433px; margin-left: 567px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 342px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- canvasElement: HTMLCanvasElement
- backgroundImage: HTMLImageElement
- snakeBodyImage: HTMLImageElement
- appleImage: HTMLImageElement
- prevTime: number
- FBS: number
- timeBetweenFrames: number
- snakeWidth: number
- snakeHeight: number
- charactersObject
- appleObject
- appleArray: [0...9]
_ _instance: Game
- canvas: Canvas
- snake: Snake
- controller: Controller
- background: Background
- isGameOver: boolean
- isGameStarted: boolean

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 280px; height: 1px; padding-top: 787px; margin-left: 567px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- showStartPage(): void
- startGame(event: KeyboardEvent):void
- initrializeApples (count: number): void
- instantiate(): void
- update(deltaTime: number): void
- draw(): void
- handleNextFrame(time: number):void
- gameOver(): void
